name: rag-knowledge-graph
description: MEOK AI Labs — RAG + Knowledge Graph. Hybrid retrieval: vector embeddings + graph relationships + hierarchical navigation.

tools.name: index_document
tools.description: Index a document for RAG retrieval. Generates embeddings and extracts entities.

tools.name: rag_query
tools.description: Query the knowledge base. Methods: vector (semantic), keyword (FTS5), hybrid (both), graph (relationship traversal).

tools.name: add_graph_edge
tools.description: Add a relationship to the knowledge graph.

tools.name: graph_query
tools.description: Traverse the knowledge graph from an entity to find connections.
